title: Home
html: INTRO: Eb Fm Eb G G# Bb 2X Eb Fm Eb/G Ever since my early childhood G# Bb Eb I heard about a God Fm Eb/G Who turned prisoners into governors G# Bb Cm Rivers into blood Bb G# Who would choose a humble shepherd G# Bb Cm To be a noble king Bb G# And all these other stories G# Bb Eb That caused my heart to sing Fm Eb/G But as soon as I grew older G# Bb Eb I wanted to break free Fm Eb/G I took my own decisions G# Bb Cm And thus saw liberty Bb G# But entrapped by transgressition G# Bb Cm When I was frightened and alone Bb G# I could feel His holy presence G#7+ Urging me to come back home :Eb/G G# Bb : Lord, I surrender all :Eb/G G# Bb : I sensed Your presence, heard Your call : Cm :And choose to live my life for you : Bb G# :Please take my heart and make it new :Fm Eb/G G# Bb : And help me understand the power of Your healing :Fm Eb/G G# : That sensitive Your appealing : Bb :All my life be restored ( Eb Fm Eb G G# Bb 2X ) Eb Fm Eb/G And it's those who feel rejected G# Bb Eb Are tired and alone Eb Fm Eb/G It is you whose life is shattered G# Bb Cm He wants to call His own Bb G# For He left His throne in Heaven G# Bb Cm A perfect price to pay Bb G# And if you can feel His presence G#7+ Why not sing this song today? :Eb/G G# Bb : Lord, I surrender all :Eb/G G# Bb : I sensed Your presence, heard Your call : Cm :And choose to live my life for you : Bb G# :Please take my heart and make it new :Fm Eb/G G# Bb : And help me understand the power of Your healing :Fm Eb/G G# : That sensitive Your appealing : Bb :All my life be restored :Eb/G G# Bb :Lord, I surrender all :Eb/G G# Bb : I sensed Your presence, heard Your call : Cm :And choose to live my life for you : Bb G# :Please take my heart and make it new :Fm Eb/G G# Bb : And help me shine Your light trough happiness and sorrow :Fm Eb/G G# : So that today and not tomorrow : Bb Eb :I may sing of Your love. : ( Eb Fm Eb G G# Bb 2X )
